codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature contract: notify is registered, uses parseInput/okResult/errResult pattern, validates PID/message, logs before write, writes a single formatted payload to /proc/<pid>/fd/1, and closes the fd. Added tests cover the required happy path and failure scenarios, including concurrent writes.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, and skill guidance for notify-handler. No high-confidence correctness, security, or behavior defects were found for this feature.
